cases.constraint_text: all egress traffic must use tls and mTLS certificates

documents.title: Egress policy
documents.content: Egress traffic must use TLS with certificate pinning.

documents.title: mTLS requirement
documents.content: All egress traffic must use mTLS certificates for service identity.

cases.constraint_text: service must authenticate requests with token verification

documents.title: crypto policy
documents.content: rotate signing keys every 30 days and archive old keys

cases.constraint_text: callbacks must use https and must not embed personally identifiable information in query strings

documents.title: External callback surface
documents.content: Callbacks MUST use HTTPS. Integrations MUST NOT embed personally identifiable information in query strings.

documents.title: Security controls catalog
documents.content: Applications MUST use TLS 1.2 or higher for HTTPS connections. Clients SHOULD NOT send secrets in URLs.

documents.title: Firewall and egress policy
documents.content: All outbound HTTPS traffic MUST traverse the corporate egress proxy.

cases.constraint_text: customer billing records must be deleted after thirty days in cold storage

documents.title: Retention policy v1
documents.content: The platform MUST retain customer billing records for seven years to satisfy audit requirements.

documents.title: Retention policy v2
documents.content: Archived customer billing records MUST be deleted after thirty days in cold storage to minimize PII exposure.

documents.title: Slack-style incident thread
documents.content: Security team notes blocked egress attempts and certificate rotation.
